============================================================
DATA CONFIDENCE NOTES
============================================================

High Confidence

• MachineDex ID
• Machine name
• Harig brand marking
• Super 612 model marking
• Manual surface grinder machine type
• Overall machine photo reference
• Nameplate photo reference
• Controls photo reference
• Tooling photo reference

Medium Confidence

• Formal name
  The formal name is assembled from visible Harig and Super 612 markings.

• Nominal Grinding Capacity
  Super 612 commonly indicates a 6 in x 12 in surface grinder size class,
  but this should be verified from OEM specifications or direct measurement.

• Serial number
  The visible serial number appears to read 15978, but the plate should be
  verified with a clearer straight-on photo.

Low Confidence / Unknown

• Exact manufacture year
• Table size
• Longitudinal table travel
• Cross feed travel
• Vertical wheelhead travel
• Grinding wheel size
• Spindle speed
• Motor horsepower
• Electrical requirements
• Magnetic chuck details
• Coolant system details
• Machine weight
• Overall dimensions
